prompt: Design the visual branding for a coffee product by combining the illustrated packaging in Image 1, the roasted coffee beans in Image 2, and the clean label style in Image 3.
prompt_refined: Generate a new image showcasing visual branding for a coffee product. The central element is a stand-up, brown kraft paper coffee bag featuring the illustrated landscape design (depicting mountains, a lake, lush foliage, and illustrated coffee beans at the bottom) seen on the packaging in Image 1. On the front of this bag, prominently place a clean, minimalist logo derived from Image 3, consisting of the word 'COFFEE' enclosed in a rectangular outline with three small coffee bean icons positioned directly above it. The coffee bag should be presented amidst or resting upon a bed of realistic roasted coffee beans, replicating the rich brown color and textured detail from Image 2.
objects: stand-up brown kraft paper coffee bag
illustrated mountains on the coffee bag
illustrated lake on the coffee bag
illustrated lush foliage on the coffee bag
illustrated coffee beans at the bottom of the landscape on the coffee bag
clean, minimalist logo on the front of the coffee bag
rectangular outline around 'COFFEE' within the logo
three small coffee bean icons positioned directly above 'COFFEE' within the logo
bed of realistic roasted coffee beans
